title: ECB convenes banks to fix flaws exposed by AI Models, FT says
description: The European Central Bank plans to press lenders to accelerate efforts to secure their IT systems after organising a meeting on cybersecurity risks with the latest artificial intelligence models, the Financial Times reported.
content:

title: AI forcing consulting firms like McKinsey to deliver results and not charge by hours: Report
description: Artificial intelligence is reportedly forcing consulting firms such as McKinsey to rethink how they charge clients. As AI makes consulting work faster and more efficient, clients increasingly want to pay for results delivered rather than hours worked, challenging the industry's traditional business model.
content: Artificial intelligence is not just changing how companies work, it is also reshaping how some of the world's biggest consulting firms make money. Clients are reportedly pushing firms such as McKinsey & Company to abandon pricing models based on the ... [2607 chars]

title: Amid growing fears of AI job losses, Sundar Pichai addresses the rise of the ‘boo strategy’
description: From graduation stages to boardrooms, artificial intelligence is becoming a reputational minefield for Silicon Valley leaders. As students fear shrinking career prospects and mounting layoffs linked to AI, commencement speeches by tech executives are increasingly turning into tense public reckonings over the future of work, creativity and economic security.
content:
As graduation season unfolds across American universities, a new challenge has emerged for technology executives invited to deliver commencement speeches: navigating student hostility towards artificial intelligence without getting booed off stage.

title: Pope Leo Is Set to Release an Encyclical About A.I. Why Is That Important?
description: Leo XIV is to issue his thoughts about artificial intelligence in the modern world, using a centuries-old form of papal communication called an encyclical, the first since he became pope.
content:
Pope Leo XIV on Monday will present his vision for how to preserve human dignity in the era of artificial intelligence.

title: University Sought to Record Preschoolers for AI Training, Documents Show
description: University of Washington (UW) researchers planned to have preschool teachers wear cameras that would record classroom activities for use in training artificial intelligence (AI) models, according to documents obtained by 404 Media and reported by multiple outlets. The study, which proposed capturing video of children as young as three, was canceled after a backlash from […]

title: Pope to release major artificial intelligence manifesto
description: Pope Leo XIV will release on Monday his long-awaited manifesto on artificial intelligence (AI), a bid to address ethical and social challenges as the technology rapidly develops worldwide. The release of "Magnificent Humanity" follows several years of study by the Church of AI-related technologies.

title: WWDC 2026: Apple’s mysterious new ‘Gen AI’ website hints at major AI announcements
description: A newly discovered “genai.apple.com” subdomain is fuelling speculation that artificial intelligence will take centre stage at Apple’s WWDC 2026 event next month. The unfinished web address has appeared just weeks before the keynote, reinforcing expectations around Siri upgrades, Apple Intelligence features and deeper AI integrations across iPhone, iPad and Mac software.

title: AI chip demand drives 6% growth for Singapore in first quarter
description: Singapore's economy surged six percent in the first quarter. Demand for artificial intelligence chips is driving this growth. This boost helps balance challenges from the Middle East conflict. The government maintains its annual economic forecast. Strong performance in trade, manufacturing, and finance sectors is noted. AI-related demand is expected to continue supporting regional economies.
